---
title: "Problem Sets"
description: "Practice problems with collapsed solutions and interactive verification."
number-sections: false
---

## Overview

Each problem set accompanies a chapter. Problems come in two types:

- **Analytical** — Question visible, solution collapsed behind a callout block. Expand when ready.
- **Computational** — Question with an interactive code block for verification. Adjust parameters and run.

Difficulty indicators: ★ standard · ★★ challenging · ★★★ advanced

---

## Available Problem Sets

| Problem Set | Chapter | Topics | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Problem Set 01](pset-01.qmd) | OLS + Selection Bias + Asymptotics | Decomposition, OLS derivation, unbiasedness, CLT-based inference | *Available (Draft v1)* |

---

::: {.callout-note}
## More problem sets will be added as chapters are completed.
:::
